top_signals.title: US Airline Stocks Erase Pandemic Losses as Oil Prices Ease
top_signals.summary: A popular gauge of the US airline industry has finally recovered from pandemic-era losses after six years, as progress on a peace deal between US and Iran pushed oil prices lower and eased the pressure on carriers’ profitability.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trillion-dollar asset manager Invesco looks to plant a flag in tokenized stablecoin reserve sector
top_signals.summary: The fund will invest primarily in U.S. Treasuries, repo agreements, and cash equivalents to maintain a stable $1 net asset value.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
